reasoning_content:
The issue is that the file path has extra quotes around it. The expected format is:
`Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:1>`

But we're outputting:
`Loc=<"/workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c":8:1>`

The line numbers are also wrong (8 instead of 1, 9 instead of 2, etc.). This is because we're reading the file with line markers, but the test files don't have line markers. Let me check the actual input file again.
